function.message: I can’t provide a birthday date because the canonical assistant prototype record does not contain a birthday field.
function.rulebook_notes: Entity/cast files are authoritative for birthdays when present; if the needed fact is not shown in the canonical file, ask for clarification instead of guessing. Date questions require an exact matching concept and disallow substituting other date fields.
function.outcome_justification: The only canonical assistant prototype match is 10_entities/cast/nora.md, which explicitly identifies relationship assistant_prototype but includes only created_on (2026-03-31) and important_dates.prototype_started (2025-12-01). There is no birthday field, so returning a date would require guessing or semantic substitution, which is forbidden.
